pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take:
**Bubba G and Mustard Boy battlein' for the bottom while The Noisemaker runs riot on Day 11.**

Man, if you told me Rafe, aka "The Noisemaker," would be runnin' the show with 16 points, I'd have laughed you outta the room, but here we are—kid's puttin' up numbers like he knows somethin' we don't. Zach's hangin' in there with him, but bubba, draftin' Saudi Arabia thinkin' oil money spells goals ain't helpin' your cause. Devin, aka "Ghost Pepper," relies on Spain to flex some tiki-taka today against Zach's Saudi squad; he's hopin' they show up like they know what a World Cup is, not like it's just another siesta in the park. I dunno, though, Spain's been known to ship goals when they should be grindin' out wins. But let's be real: "Mustard Boy" ain’t gonna be spreadin’ the love on the pitch today; I got "Ghost Pepper’s" Spain fryin’ up those Samis like they’re a side of falafel.

pundit_takes.headline: Spain set to expose Mustard Boy's misplaced draft confidence
pundit_takes.subtitle: Zach to rely on Saudi Arabia's unpredictable defense at noon

pundit_takes.headline: Noisemaker Rafe still topping standings despite drafting absent teams
pundit_takes.subtitle: "Even a broken clock is right twice a day," notes observer

pundit_takes.headline: Ghost Pepper banks on Spain while roasting Mustard Boy's pick
pundit_takes.subtitle: Devin hopes Spain spices up his last-place performance

pundit_takes.headline: Bubba G's faith in Egypt to face Kiwi kickoff challenge
pundit_takes.subtitle: Gunner's Egypt set to encounter New Zealand's unheralded defense tonight

rome_analytics_quotes: Rafe leads the pack without a single upset point, pure match play magic.
Rafe's Tier-1 dependency at 38% proves ignorance is his secret weapon.
Gayden vs. Rafe is dead even; who's buying Thanksgiving dinner after this tie?
Sim's 13% shot has Rafe king of the hill; chaos reigns supreme.
